commit_scope: Make the connected Android phone and Mac witness a repeatable mesh-learning receipt feeding Form-native native-first/oracle-retirement routing.

commands: coord join && coord claim "android mac mesh learning receipts"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/android-mesh-learning-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused Form validation returned 4095 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY  android-mesh-learning`. The adb receipt launched Coherence Sense and recorded SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a with Coherence Sense installed/running, 39 hardware sensors, camera, microphone, GPS, WiFi, Bluetooth LE, NFC, Vulkan compute, and Mac witness liveness. Speech, vision, and multimodal alignment route native-first with oracle sampling; summarize, code-lower, tool-select, and distill-retire route native-first. An attempted full `cd form && VALIDATE_JOBS=4 FOURTH_PREPARE_ALL_BATCH_MAX=0 ./validate.sh` was externally terminated by SIGTERM while child `run_one_indexed` jobs were active, so no full-suite aggregate pass is claimed from that attempt.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this local Android/Mac physical receipt slice.

phase_gate.reason: Focused local proof and physical adb receipt passed; full-suite aggregate was SIGTERM-interrupted under host contention, and CI/review/merge remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The repository now has a repeatable physical Android/Mac receipt that can run once or continuously, launches the Coherence Sense app through adb, records safe capability/liveness summaries, and maps expensive LLM/model/compiler feature lanes to native-first, native-first-with-oracle-sampling, or teacher-until-samples routing.
test_flows: Validate the Form-native android-mesh-learning band at 4095 with fourth-arm proof.
Admit the band through the fourth-arm manifest gate.
Launch Coherence Sense on the authorized Android device and write a safe summary JSON receipt.
Inspect the receipt for device ABI/model, app liveness, sensor categories, feature categories, Mac witness liveness, and route decisions.
